session.assistant:
## Results Summary
**make fast-ci FAILED** - Exit code 2
### What Passed: - Lint check: All checks passed - Format check: 1727 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK (.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date) - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing: All properly paired (19 files checked, 0 violations) - Unit Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed - Unit Tests (erk-mcp): All passed (28 tests)
### What Failed:
**1. Prettier Check (2 files with code style issues):** - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**2. Type Check (ty) - 1 diagnostic:** - **File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/view/cli.py:191:19` - **Error:** `error[unresolved-attribute]: Object of type 'PrViewResult' has no attribute 'plan_id'` - **Code:** `id_text = f"#{result.plan_id}"`
**3. Unit Tests (erk) - 24 failures, 5987 passed:**
Key failures relate to `plan_id` vs `pr_id` naming mismatch in `PrViewResult`:
- `FAILED tests/unit/cli/test_pr_json.py::TestPrViewResult::test_to_json_dict_includes_all_fields` - TypeError: `PrViewResult.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'plan_id'` - `FAILED tests/unit/cli/test_pr_json.py::TestPrViewResult::test_to_json_dict_omits_body_when_none` - Same TypeError - `FAILED tests/unit/cli/test_pr_json.py::TestPrViewResult::test_to_json_dict_nullable_fields` - Same TypeError - Multiple failures in `tests/commands/pr/test_view.py` and `tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py` - AttributeError: `'PrViewResult' object has no attribute 'plan_id'` - `FAILED tests/unit/cli/test_pr_dispatch.py::test_dispatch_succeeds_without_plan_header` - TypeError: `write_dispatch_metadata() got an unexpected keyword argument 'plan_number'`. Did you mean 'pr_number'?
The core issue appears to be incomplete migration from `plan_id`/`plan_number` to `pr_id`/`pr_number` in the PR/view command implementation and tests.
